tools.name: get_protocol
tools.description: Generate an evidence-based whole-food plant-based protocol for one of 47 chronic conditions. Returns therapeutic foods, daily meal structure, foods to minimize, monitoring markers, and clinical citations.

tools.name: query_nutrition_topic
tools.description: Ask a nutrition or food-as-medicine question. Returns evidence-based answer from the 200-chunk lifestyle medicine knowledge base.

tools.name: interpret_labs
tools.description: Interpret a panel of lab values against ACLM-optimized reference ranges. Returns risk classification per marker, lifestyle interventions, and medication deprescription signals.

tools.name: marker_reference
tools.description: Look up the ACLM-optimized reference range and lifestyle intervention plan for a single biomarker (e.g., apob, lp_a, hscrp, hba1c, fasting_insulin, vitamin_d).

tools.name: glp_protocol
tools.description: Generate a GLP-aware nutrition protocol composed on top of any active chronic condition. Returns protein floor (1.2-1.6 g/kg), fiber ramp schedule, GI tolerance interventions, resistance training prescription, hydration target, and phase-specific guidance.

tools.name: glp_phase_guide
tools.description: Return the protocol overview for a specific GLP-1 therapy phase (starting, titrating, maintenance, tapering, post_drug).

tools.name: check_interactions
tools.description: Check a list of medications for food-drug interactions, nutrient depletions, and timing-critical dosing requirements.

tools.name: drug_safety
tools.description: Return the food-drug safety profile for a single medication.

tools.name: lifestyle_query
tools.description: Ask any lifestyle medicine question. Returns evidence-based answer with citations from a 200-chunk knowledge base spanning ACLM 6-pillars, B.O.N.S.A.I. nutrition, drug-food interactions, lab interpretation, GLP guidance, wearables, and CGM signal interpretation.
